status.title: My current status
status.extremeFatigueDescription: Your fatigue score has exceeded the allowed threshold. It is recommended to take a break or request a shift rescheduling from the shift supervisor.
status.insufficientSleepDescription: 3 hours of sleep have been recorded. The recommended amount is 7 to 8 hours. It is recommended to rest before continuing the shift to avoid negligence.

alerts.title: My personal alerts
alerts.description: These alerts are related to your health and fatigue status recorded by your wearable, as well as possible anomalies not directly related to fatigue.
alerts.extremeFatigueDescription: Your fatigue score has exceeded the allowed threshold. It is recommended to take a break or request a shift rescheduling from the shift supervisor.
alerts.insufficientSleepDescription: 3 hours of sleep have been recorded in the last 24 hours. The recommended amount is between 7 and 8 hours. Consider taking a break before continuing your shift.
alerts.highHeartRateDescription: 105 bpm were recorded during your last shift. The normal range is between 60 and 100 bpm. This could be related to stress or elevated physical effort.

history.title: My fatigue assessment history
history.description: Monitor your fatigue level and review preventive recommendations based on your recorded assessments.
history.noRecords: No assessments were found for that date range.
history.highRiskRecommendation: A 45-minute break is recommended. Your fatigue level may affect motor precision and decision-making. Consider requesting relief if symptoms persist.
history.mediumRiskRecommendation: It is recommended to reduce physical workload and keep monitoring your indicators during the current shift.
history.lowRiskRecommendation: Your current condition is stable. Maintain proper hydration, active breaks and regular monitoring.

recovery.title: Recovery and relief requests
recovery.description: Request preventive relief if you feel your clinical capacity is compromised.
recovery.activeRecommendationsHint: Preventive actions suggested according to your recent assessments.
recovery.recommendationDescription: A 45-minute break is recommended. Your fatigue level may affect motor precision and decision-making. Consider requesting relief if symptoms persist.
recovery.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly describe the reason for your request

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.languageHelp: The selected language will be applied to the fixed texts of the application.
settings.passwordFeatureMessage: The password change feature will be implemented soon.

dashboard.title: Hospital Main Dashboard
dashboard.description: Comprehensive supervision of clinical risk, operational metrics and administration.

dashboard.recentAlertC: Person C. Rest assigned 23 min ago
